final_answer:
Phase 1 is finished: the scanner frontend rebrand pass is in, and both `lint:tsc` and `build` pass.

Why this matters: Phase 1 is now build-verified, so the frontend is stable after the rebrand cleanup instead of being “partially changed.”

What is still intentionally not renamed in Phase 1 (13 files, compatibility/dependency/deploy contracts):
- Dependency source URLs in [package.json](/srv/repos/gold-chain/scan/blockscout-frontend/package.json) and [pnpm-lock.yaml](/srv/repos/gold-chain/scan/blockscout-frontend/pnpm-lock.yaml) (`github.com/blockscout/gradient-avatar`).
- Helm/deploy chart identifiers in [helmfile.yaml.gotmpl](/srv/repos/gold-chain/scan/blockscout-frontend/deploy/helmfile.yaml.gotmpl) and review values files.
- External API/schema field names required by typed contracts (`deployment_blockscout_base_url`, `blockscout_*`) in [NameDomainDetails.tsx](/srv/repos/gold-chain/scan/blockscout-frontend/ui/nameDomain/NameDomainDetails.tsx), [rewardsConfig.ts](/srv/repos/gold-chain/scan/blockscout-frontend/mocks/rewards/rewardsConfig.ts), and related files.

Next concrete step: Phase 2 is the strict compatibility-contract cutover (dependency forks + schema/field migration + deploy chart rename) to drive these remaining `blockscout` tokens to zero, then re-run full checks.
